Container.Name: dockerdiscordcontrol
Container.Description: Control your Docker containers directly from Discord with an interactive bot and web dashboard.
Container.Overview: Control your Docker containers directly from Discord![br][br] Interactive Discord bot with buttons to start, stop, restart, and monitor containers. Includes a web dashboard for configuration, task scheduling, auto-actions, and channel translation (DeepL/Google/Microsoft). Available in 40 languages.[br][br] Alpine-based image, less than 200 MB RAM.[br][br] [b]Setup:[/b] Access the Web UI at http://[YOUR-IP]:9374 and log in with username "admin", password "setup".[br] Homepage: https://ddc.bot
Container.Requires: Docker socket access for container management. Create a Discord bot token before first use.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for web UI admin user (username: admin). If not set, use username "admin", password "setup" for first login.

Config.Name: Flask Secret Key
Config.Description: Secret key for session security. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. If not set, sessions reset on restart.

Config.Name: Discord Bot Token
Config.Description: Discord bot token. Can also be configured via the Web UI after first login.
